name: sidebar-controlled
visual_summary: The Sidebar-Controlled component is a flexible layout container that can be used to create side navigations. It is typically used in applications with a wide-screen design, allowing the main content to be easily accessible. This component can be toggled open and closed for an efficient user experience.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-controlled
Description: The Sidebar-Controlled component is a flexible layout container that can be used to create side navigations. It is typically used in applications with a wide-screen design, allowing the main content to be easily accessible. This component can be toggled open and closed for an efficient user experience.
Style: e.g. minimal
Interactions: e.g. toggle
Tags: layout, navigation, responsive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
